summary: QA pass and fixes for pathing, asset manifests, JSON validity, and merged visible Voice Studio preview engine.

tests.localHttpAccess: passed for index.html, CSS, project-loader scripts, voice engine scripts, and data/studio JSON files
tests.jsonParse: passed: 87/87 JSON files parse after fix
tests.audioAssets: passed: 1000 media/a files present; 982 WAV files parse with Python wave; no audio file under 100 bytes
tests.assetManifest: passed after pruning: json/assets-index.json has 0 missing shortPath references
tests.voiceEngineProgrammatic: passed: BelavadosSpeechApi loads, chooses natural browser voice when available, applies Mirecurl biome accent metadata, clamps non-construct rate/pitch to safe natural ranges

fixesApplied: Fixed json/srcjson_0019.json by removing JavaScript-style comments so it is valid JSON.
Pruned json/assets-index.json and js/asset-index-data.js so manifests no longer point to missing audio/media paths from the pre-pruned source package.
Updated js/project-loader.js to load the advanced voice engine layers before the visible three-tab studio core.
Updated js/studio/character-studio-core.js so the visible Voice Studio preview uses BelavadosSpeechApi + naturalness guard when available, with safe fallback.
Added non-construct naturalization defaults: humanVariation min 7.2, safer clarity/warmth/accent handling, capped robotic roughness/stutter.
Added construct detection for Warforged/Construct/Autognome/Clockwork/etc.; robotic/mechanical cadence is allowed only there.
Replaced extreme browser SpeechSynthesis pitch/rate export values with natural safe ranges: pitch 0.955–1.075 and rate 0.84–1.15.
Added biome accent shaping for preview text and voice selection hints through BelavadosBiomeAccents.
importantLimitations: The sandbox cannot meaningfully judge subjective audio quality by ear. The audit verified code paths, generated controls, voice selection logic, and non-robotic guard ranges programmatically.
Browser SpeechSynthesis voice quality depends on the device/browser voices installed. Natural/online voices in Edge/Chrome/Windows/macOS will sound better than minimal fallback voices.

Two CSS files still reference external background images; those are visual background URLs, not local package path failures. If offline-only is required, those images should be stored locally and the CSS URLs changed.
